requirement_topic.en: ARE Grid-Connected BESS Licensing — Mauritania Energy Regulator Approval
requirement_topic.zh: ARE并网BESS许可——毛里塔尼亚能源监管机构批准
requirement_topic.zht: ARE併網BESS許可——茅利塔尼亞能源監管機構批准

summary.en: ARE (Autorité de Régulation — Mauritania's energy regulatory authority) is the licensing authority for electricity generation, transmission, distribution, and storage activities in Mauritania. All grid-connected BESS installations — whether utility-scale, behind-the-meter, or integrated into renewable energy projects — are expected to require ARE authorisation before commissioning. Mauritania's electricity sector is governed by the Electricity Act (Loi sur l'Électricité) and ARE's regulatory framework. For donor/lender-financed projects (World Bank, AfDB, EU programmes including those supporting Aman and Nour), ARE approval is a standard condition precedent in power purchase agreements and project financing agreements. ARE technical requirements for BESS specifically have not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date; project-specific connection agreement terms must be obtained directly from ARE and SOMELEC (the national utility).
summary.zh: ARE（监管机构——毛里塔尼亚能源监管机构）是毛里塔尼亚电力生产、输电、配电及储能活动的许可主管机关。所有并网BESS装置——无论是公用事业规模、表后还是集成于可再生能源项目——预计在投入使用前均须取得ARE授权。毛里塔尼亚电力行业由《电力法》（Loi sur l'Électricité）和ARE监管框架管控。对于捐赠方/贷款方融资项目（世界银行、非开行、欧盟计划，包括支持Aman和Nour的项目），ARE批准是购电协议和项目融资协议中的标准先决条件。截至本数据集日期，ARE针对BESS的具体技术要求尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认；项目专属并网协议条款须直接向ARE及SOMELEC（国家电力公司）获取。
summary.zht: ARE（監管機構——茅利塔尼亞能源監管機構）是茅利塔尼亞電力生產、輸電、配電及儲能活動的許可主管機關。所有併網BESS裝置——無論是公用事業規模、表後還是集成於可再生能源項目——預計在投入使用前均須取得ARE授權。茅利塔尼亞電力行業由《電力法》（Loi sur l'Électricité）和ARE監管框架管控。對於捐贈方/貸款方融資項目（世界銀行、非開行、歐盟計畫，包括支持Aman和Nour的項目），ARE批准是購電協議和項目融資協議中的標準先決條件。截至本數據集日期，ARE針對BESS的具體技術要求尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認；項目專屬併網協議條款須直接向ARE及SOMELEC（國家電力公司）獲取。

standards_or_laws: Loi sur l'Électricité (Mauritania Electricity Act) — legal basis for ARE licensing of generation and storage activities (specific article references unconfirmed as of dataset date)
ARE (Autorité de Régulation) — authorisation required for grid-connected BESS; specific BESS technical regulations not confirmed from public sources
IFC Performance Standards — typically applied in World Bank and AfDB financed BESS projects in Mauritania, may require IEC standards compliance
World Bank / AfDB Environmental and Social Standards — standard conditions for donor/lender financed Mauritania energy projects

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (same 50 Hz frequency as Mauritania and same 220/380 V voltage) — this is a key compatibility advantage versus other export markets. However, PCS protection settings, communication protocols, and ancillary service parameters must be reconfigured to meet SOMELEC and ARE-specific requirements.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V——与毛里塔尼亚50 Hz频率和220/380 V电压相同，这是相较其他出口市场的关键兼容优势。但PCS保护设定、通信协议及辅助服务参数须重新配置以满足SOMELEC和ARE的具体要求。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V——與茅利塔尼亞50 Hz頻率和220/380 V電壓相同，這是相較其他出口市場的關鍵兼容優勢。但PCS保護設定、通訊協議及輔助服務參數須重新配置以滿足SOMELEC和ARE的具體要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy ARE's Mauritania licensing requirements. Key points requiring attention: (a) ARE licensing — engage ARE at the earliest project stage to determine authorisation requirements for grid-connected BESS; no publicly confirmed BESS-specific ARE licensing procedure has been identified as of the dataset date; (b) SOMELEC interconnection agreement — SOMELEC is the national utility and its technical requirements for BESS grid connection must be confirmed before equipment design is finalised; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance — donor/lender project specifications routinely require IEC 62933-5-2 evidence for grid-scale electrochemical BESS; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent by international financiers; (d) SCADA/communication protocols — confirm the protocol required by SOMELEC for BESS monitoring (IEC 61850 or project-specific); (e) voltage compatibility — Mauritania's grid is 220/380 V 50 Hz, matching China's domestic grid, so no voltage re-parameterisation is required (unlike Gulf markets), but confirm SOMELEC's specific protection settings and ride-through requirements.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足ARE毛里塔尼亚许可要求。需注意的要点：（a）ARE许可——在项目最早阶段与ARE接触，确定并网BESS的授权要求；截至本数据集日期，尚未发现可公开确认的ARE BESS专属许可程序；（b）SOMELEC互联协议——SOMELEC是国家电力公司，其BESS并网技术要求须在设备设计最终确定前确认；（c）IEC 62933系列合规——捐赠方/贷款方项目规格通常要求电网规模电化学BESS的IEC 62933-5-2证据；国际融资方不接受中国GB/T标准作为等效依据；（d）SCADA/通信协议——确认SOMELEC对BESS监控要求的协议（IEC 61850或项目专属）；（e）电压兼容性——毛里塔尼亚电网为220/380 V 50 Hz，与中国国内电网匹配，无需电压重新参数化（不同于海湾市场），但需确认SOMELEC的具体保护设定和穿越要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足ARE茅利塔尼亞許可要求。需注意的要點：（a）ARE許可——在項目最早階段與ARE接觸，確定併網BESS的授權要求；截至本數據集日期，尚未發現可公開確認的ARE BESS專屬許可程序；（b）SOMELEC互聯協議——SOMELEC是國家電力公司，其BESS併網技術要求須在設備設計最終確定前確認；（c）IEC 62933系列合規——捐贈方/貸款方項目規格通常要求電網規模電化學BESS的IEC 62933-5-2證據；國際融資方不接受中國GB/T標準作為等效依據；（d）SCADA/通訊協議——確認SOMELEC對BESS監控要求的協議（IEC 61850或項目專屬）；（e）電壓兼容性——茅利塔尼亞電網為220/380 V 50 Hz，與中國國內電網匹配，無需電壓重新參數化（不同於海灣市場），但需確認SOMELEC的具體保護設定和穿越要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ARE authorisation is required for grid-connected BESS in Mauritania; specific BESS technical requirements and ARE licensing procedures not confirmed from public sources as of dataset date — engage ARE and SOMELEC directly
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Mauritania

source.publisher: ARE (Autorité de Régulation — Mauritania Energy Regulatory Authority)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy ARE's Mauritania licensing requirements. A key technical advantage for Mauritania versus other export markets is voltage compatibility — Mauritania's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid matches China's domestic grid. However, ARE and SOMELEC licencing, interconnection agreement terms, IEC 62933 evidence (required by donor/lender specifications), and SCADA protocol compliance must all be addressed separately. ARE BESS-specific licensing requirements have not been confirmed from public sources as of the dataset date — direct ARE and SOMELEC engagement is essential before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足ARE毛里塔尼亚许可要求。相较其他出口市场，毛里塔尼亚的关键技术优势在于电压兼容性——毛里塔尼亚220/380 V 50 Hz电网与中国国内电网匹配。但ARE和SOMELEC许可、互联协议条款、IEC 62933证据（捐赠方/贷款方规格要求）及SCADA协议合规均须单独处理。截至本数据集日期，ARE BESS专属许可要求尚未从公开来源得到确认——在设备采购最终确定前，直接与ARE和SOMELEC接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足ARE茅利塔尼亞許可要求。相較其他出口市場，茅利塔尼亞的關鍵技術優勢在於電壓兼容性——茅利塔尼亞220/380 V 50 Hz電網與中國國內電網匹配。但ARE和SOMELEC許可、互聯協議條款、IEC 62933證據（捐贈方/貸款方規格要求）及SCADA協議合規均須單獨處理。截至本數據集日期，ARE BESS專屬許可要求尚未從公開來源得到確認——在設備採購最終確定前，直接與ARE和SOMELEC接觸至關重要。

requirement_topic.en: SOMELEC Interconnection Agreement — Grid-Connection Technical Requirements for BESS
requirement_topic.zh: SOMELEC互联协议——BESS并网技术要求
requirement_topic.zht: SOMELEC互聯協議——BESS併網技術要求

summary.en: SOMELEC (Société Mauritanienne d'Électricité) is the national electricity utility of Mauritania, responsible for electricity generation, transmission, and distribution. Grid-connected BESS installations — including utility-scale storage co-located with solar PV or wind (as in the Aman and Nour projects) and standalone storage — must enter into an interconnection agreement with SOMELEC defining technical requirements for grid connection, metering, protection coordination, and operational parameters. SOMELEC's grid operates at 220/380 V (50 Hz) at the distribution level, and at higher transmission voltages for utility-scale projects. Specific SOMELEC technical requirements for BESS grid connection, including PCS protection settings, reactive power capability, frequency response, and communication/SCADA interface requirements, have not been confirmed from publicly accessible official documentation as of the dataset date. These must be obtained directly from SOMELEC during the project development phase.
summary.zh: SOMELEC（毛里塔尼亚电力公司）是毛里塔尼亚国家电力企业，负责电力生产、输电和配电。并网BESS装置——包括与光伏或风电配套的公用事业规模储能（如Aman和Nour项目）及独立储能——须与SOMELEC签订互联协议，明确并网技术要求、计量、保护协调及运行参数。SOMELEC电网配电层级运行参数为220/380 V（50 Hz），公用事业规模项目采用更高输电电压。截至本数据集日期，SOMELEC针对BESS并网的具体技术要求——包括PCS保护设定、无功功率能力、频率响应及通信/SCADA接口要求——尚未从可公开获取的官方文件得到确认，须在项目开发阶段直接向SOMELEC获取。
summary.zht: SOMELEC（茅利塔尼亞電力公司）是茅利塔尼亞國家電力企業，負責電力生產、輸電和配電。併網BESS裝置——包括與光伏或風電配套的公用事業規模儲能（如Aman和Nour項目）及獨立儲能——須與SOMELEC簽訂互聯協議，明確併網技術要求、計量、保護協調及運行參數。SOMELEC電網配電層級運行參數為220/380 V（50 Hz），公用事業規模項目採用更高輸電電壓。截至本數據集日期，SOMELEC針對BESS併網的具體技術要求——包括PCS保護設定、無功功率能力、頻率響應及通訊/SCADA接口要求——尚未從可公開獲取的官方文件得到確認，須在項目開發階段直接向SOMELEC獲取。

standards_or_laws: SOMELEC interconnection agreement — technical conditions for grid-connected BESS (specific published grid code or BESS technical specification not confirmed as of dataset date; engage SOMELEC directly)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Safety requirements for grid-scale electrochemical BESS (expected donor/lender and project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 60364 series — Electrical installations (applicable at project electrical installation level)

summary.en: Chinese BESS grid-connection validation follows NEA-authorised procedures using GB/T 36558-2023 and NB/T 42090-2016 standards. China's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid matches Mauritania's distribution-level parameters, which means PCS hardware and protection relay voltage thresholds do not require fundamental redesign (unlike Gulf or European exports). However, SOMELEC's specific protection coordination, frequency response requirements, reactive power capability, and SCADA communication protocol must be verified and configured in line with SOMELEC's interconnection agreement — these are not satisfied by Chinese NEA grid approval documentation alone.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网验证遵循NEA授权程序，采用GB/T 36558-2023和NB/T 42090-2016标准。中国220/380 V 50 Hz电网与毛里塔尼亚配电级参数匹配，意味着PCS硬件和保护继电器电压阈值无需根本性重新设计（不同于海湾或欧洲出口）。但SOMELEC的具体保护协调、频率响应要求、无功功率能力及SCADA通信协议须依据SOMELEC互联协议进行核实和配置——仅凭中国NEA并网批准文件无法满足这些要求。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網驗證遵循NEA授權程序，採用GB/T 36558-2023和NB/T 42090-2016標準。中國220/380 V 50 Hz電網與茅利塔尼亞配電級參數匹配，意味著PCS硬件和保護繼電器電壓閾值無需根本性重新設計（不同於海灣或歐洲出口）。但SOMELEC的具體保護協調、頻率響應要求、無功功率能力及SCADA通訊協議須依據SOMELEC互聯協議進行核實和配置——僅憑中國NEA併網批准文件無法滿足這些要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: SOMELEC interconnection agreement terms are required for all grid-connected BESS and have not been publicly confirmed as of the dataset date. The 220/380 V 50 Hz voltage compatibility with China reduces hardware redesign risk, but the following must still be addressed: (a) SOMELEC-specific PCS protection settings and ride-through curves — confirm with SOMELEC before firmware lock-down; (b) reactive power capability and power factor requirements — utility-scale projects often require dynamic reactive support; (c) SCADA/communication interface — confirm whether SOMELEC requires IEC 61850, DNP3, Modbus, or a proprietary protocol; (d) metering and billing requirements — SOMELEC metering specifications for BESS charging/discharging cycles; (e) for donor/lender projects, the project's lender technical advisor (LTA) will typically independently verify SOMELEC compliance — engage the LTA early to align on IEC 62933 evidence package.
gap.zh: 差距：SOMELEC互联协议条款是所有并网BESS的要求，截至本数据集日期尚未公开确认。220/380 V 50 Hz电压与中国兼容降低了硬件重新设计风险，但以下事项仍须处理：（a）SOMELEC专属PCS保护设定和穿越曲线——在固件锁定前与SOMELEC确认；（b）无功功率能力和功率因数要求——公用事业规模项目通常需要动态无功支撑；（c）SCADA/通信接口——确认SOMELEC是否要求IEC 61850、DNP3、Modbus或专有协议；（d）计量和结算要求——SOMELEC针对BESS充放电周期的计量规格；（e）对于捐赠方/贷款方项目，项目贷款方技术顾问（LTA）通常会独立核实SOMELEC合规——尽早与LTA接触，就IEC 62933证据包达成一致。
gap.zht: 差距：SOMELEC互聯協議條款是所有併網BESS的要求，截至本數據集日期尚未公開確認。220/380 V 50 Hz電壓與中國兼容降低了硬件重新設計風險，但以下事項仍須處理：（a）SOMELEC專屬PCS保護設定和穿越曲線——在韌體鎖定前與SOMELEC確認；（b）無功功率能力和功率因數要求——公用事業規模項目通常需要動態無功支撐；（c）SCADA/通訊接口——確認SOMELEC是否要求IEC 61850、DNP3、Modbus或專有協議；（d）計量和結算要求——SOMELEC針對BESS充放電週期的計量規格；（e）對於捐贈方/貸款方項目，項目貸款方技術顧問（LTA）通常會獨立核實SOMELEC合規——盡早與LTA接觸，就IEC 62933證據包達成一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SOMELEC interconnection agreement required for all grid-connected BESS in Mauritania; specific published technical requirements for BESS not confirmed as of dataset date
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — NEA grid-operator approval and GB/T 36558 compliance mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Mauritania

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SOMELEC interconnection agreement is required for all grid-connected BESS in Mauritania. The 220/380 V 50 Hz voltage compatibility with China's domestic grid is a technical advantage that reduces hardware redesign costs. However, SOMELEC-specific protection settings, reactive power, SCADA protocol, and metering requirements must be confirmed directly with SOMELEC and satisfied in the project's PCS configuration. For donor/lender projects, the lender technical advisor will independently assess SOMELEC compliance — coordinate early with the LTA on IEC 62933 evidence package requirements. No publicly confirmed SOMELEC BESS grid-connection technical specification has been identified as of the dataset date.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SOMELEC互联协议是毛里塔尼亚所有并网BESS的要求。220/380 V 50 Hz电压与中国国内电网的兼容性是降低硬件重新设计成本的技术优势。但SOMELEC专属保护设定、无功功率、SCADA协议及计量要求须直接与SOMELEC确认，并在项目PCS配置中满足。对于捐赠方/贷款方项目，贷款方技术顾问将独立评估SOMELEC合规——尽早与LTA协调IEC 62933证据包要求。截至本数据集日期，尚未发现已公开确认的SOMELEC BESS并网技术规格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SOMELEC互聯協議是茅利塔尼亞所有併網BESS的要求。220/380 V 50 Hz電壓與中國國內電網的兼容性是降低硬件重新設計成本的技術優勢。但SOMELEC專屬保護設定、無功功率、SCADA協議及計量要求須直接與SOMELEC確認，並在項目PCS配置中滿足。對於捐贈方/貸款方項目，貸款方技術顧問將獨立評估SOMELEC合規——盡早與LTA協調IEC 62933證據包要求。截至本數據集日期，尚未發現已公開確認的SOMELEC BESS併網技術規格。

requirement_topic.en: Donor/Lender Project Specifications — IEC 62933 and IFC Performance Standards for Mauritania BESS
requirement_topic.zh: 捐赠方/贷款方项目规格——毛里塔尼亚BESS的IEC 62933和IFC绩效标准
requirement_topic.zht: 捐贈方/貸款方項目規格——茅利塔尼亞BESS的IEC 62933和IFC績效標準

summary.en: The majority of large-scale BESS deployments in Mauritania are financed by multilateral development banks and bilateral donors, including the World Bank (International Development Association), African Development Bank (AfDB), European Union, and bilateral agencies. These financiers apply their own technical and environmental/social standards as conditions of financing, which typically mandate internationally recognised IEC standards for BESS. IFC Performance Standards (applied across World Bank Group projects) and AfDB's Integrated Safeguards System typically require IEC 62619 for cell/module safety and IEC 62933-5-2 for system-level safety and grid-integration for electrochemical BESS. The Aman project (renewable energy integration, World Bank/AfDB-supported) and Nour project (solar PV, donor-financed) represent the type of Mauritania BESS context where these lender requirements apply. Chinese GB/T standards alone are not accepted by these financiers as equivalent to IEC compliance.
summary.zh: 毛里塔尼亚大规模BESS部署主要由多边开发银行和双边捐赠方融资，包括世界银行（国际开发协会）、非洲开发银行（非开行）、欧盟及双边机构。这些融资方将自身技术和环境/社会标准作为融资条件，通常强制要求BESS采用国际认可的IEC标准。IFC绩效标准（适用于世界银行集团项目）和非开行综合保障体系通常要求电化学BESS的电芯/模组安全满足IEC 62619、系统级安全和并网满足IEC 62933-5-2。Aman项目（可再生能源整合，世界银行/非开行支持）和Nour项目（光伏，捐赠方融资）代表了此类贷款方要求适用的毛里塔尼亚BESS典型背景。这些融资方不单独接受中国GB/T标准作为IEC合规的等效依据。
summary.zht: 茅利塔尼亞大規模BESS部署主要由多邊開發銀行和雙邊捐贈方融資，包括世界銀行（國際開發協會）、非洲開發銀行（非開行）、歐盟及雙邊機構。這些融資方將自身技術和環境/社會標準作為融資條件，通常強制要求BESS採用國際認可的IEC標準。IFC績效標準（適用於世界銀行集團項目）和非開行綜合保障體系通常要求電化學BESS的電芯/模組安全滿足IEC 62619、系統級安全和併網滿足IEC 62933-5-2。Aman項目（可再生能源整合，世界銀行/非開行支持）和Nour項目（光伏，捐贈方融資）代表了此類貸款方要求適用的茅利塔尼亞BESS典型背景。這些融資方不單獨接受中國GB/T標準作為IEC合規的等效依據。

standards_or_laws: IFC Performance Standards on Environmental and Social Sustainability (2012) — applied to World Bank Group-financed projects including BESS in Mauritania
AfDB Integrated Safeguards System — applied to AfDB-financed energy projects in Mauritania
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (standard typically required in donor/lender BESS project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (standard typically required in donor/lender BESS project specifications)
World Bank Procurement Regulations for IPF Borrowers — procurement standards governing equipment specifications in World Bank-financed projects

summary.en: Chinese BESS manufacturers typically hold GB/T 36558-2023 and GB/T 36276-2023 (or GB 44240-2024 from August 2025) certifications as their primary compliance baseline. These Chinese standards are not recognised by World Bank, AfDB, or EU lender frameworks as equivalent to IEC 62619 or IEC 62933-5-2. For access to donor/lender-financed Mauritania BESS projects, Chinese suppliers must obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from ILAC-accredited laboratories (in addition to Chinese GB compliance) and provide IEC 62933-5-2 system-level documentation. This is an incremental compliance cost, not a fundamental product redesign requirement.
summary.zh: 中国BESS制造商通常持有GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 36276-2023（或2025年8月起的GB 44240-2024）认证作为主要合规基准。世界银行、非开行或欧盟贷款方框架不认可这些中国标准等同于IEC 62619或IEC 62933-5-2。为进入捐赠方/贷款方融资的毛里塔尼亚BESS项目，中国供应商须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书（额外于中国GB合规），并提供IEC 62933-5-2系统级文件。这是增量合规成本，而非根本性产品重新设计要求。
summary.zht: 中國BESS製造商通常持有GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 36276-2023（或2025年8月起的GB 44240-2024）認證作為主要合規基準。世界銀行、非開行或歐盟貸款方框架不認可這些中國標準等同於IEC 62619或IEC 62933-5-2。為進入捐贈方/貸款方融資的茅利塔尼亞BESS項目，中國供應商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書（額外於中國GB合規），並提供IEC 62933-5-2系統級文件。這是增量合規成本，而非根本性產品重新設計要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (mandatory from August 2025; not equivalent to IEC 62619 for donor/lender acceptance)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (voluntary; not equivalent to IEC 62619)

gap.en: Gap: Donor/lender project specifications for Mauritania BESS projects routinely require IEC 62619 (cell/module safety) and IEC 62933-5-2 (system safety) as conditions of equipment acceptance. Chinese GB/T standards alone are not accepted. Key actions: (a) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules; (b) prepare IEC 62933-5-2 system-level safety documentation; (c) engage the project's lender technical advisor (LTA) at the bid stage to confirm the specific evidence package required; (d) donor procurement rules (World Bank, AfDB) may include international competitive bidding (ICB) requirements — confirm eligibility and procurement compliance early; (e) note that project-specific technical specifications may add further requirements beyond IEC baselines (e.g., climate-specific environmental ratings, cybersecurity, or O&M documentation in French or Arabic).
gap.zh: 差距：毛里塔尼亚BESS项目的捐赠方/贷款方项目规格通常将IEC 62619（电芯/模组安全）和IEC 62933-5-2（系统安全）作为设备验收条件。仅有中国GB/T标准不被接受。关键行动：（a）从ILAC认可实验室取得电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（b）准备IEC 62933-5-2系统级安全文件；（c）在投标阶段与项目贷款方技术顾问（LTA）接触，确认所需的具体证据包；（d）捐赠方采购规则（世界银行、非开行）可能包含国际竞争性招标（ICB）要求——尽早确认资格和采购合规；（e）注意项目专属技术规格可能在IEC基准之外增加更多要求（如气候专属环境等级、网络安全或法语/阿拉伯语运维文件）。
gap.zht: 差距：茅利塔尼亞BESS項目的捐贈方/貸款方項目規格通常將IEC 62619（電芯/模組安全）和IEC 62933-5-2（系統安全）作為設備驗收條件。僅有中國GB/T標準不被接受。關鍵行動：（a）從ILAC認可實驗室取得電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（b）準備IEC 62933-5-2系統級安全文件；（c）在投標階段與項目貸款方技術顧問（LTA）接觸，確認所需的具體證據包；（d）捐贈方採購規則（世界銀行、非開行）可能包含國際競爭性招標（ICB）要求——盡早確認資格和採購合規；（e）注意項目專屬技術規格可能在IEC基準之外增加更多要求（如氣候專屬環境等級、網絡安全或法語/阿拉伯語運維文件）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in donor/lender-financed projects — IEC 62619 and IEC 62933-5-2 compliance is typically required by World Bank, AfDB, and EU project specifications as a condition of equipment acceptance; not nationally legislated in Mauritania
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — Chinese GB/T standards are the manufacturing baseline; IEC compliance must be obtained additionally for donor/lender project access

source.publisher: International Finance Corporation (IFC) — IFC Performance Standards on Environmental and Social Sustainability

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Donor/lender-financed BESS projects in Mauritania (World Bank, AfDB, EU) require IEC 62619 and IEC 62933-5-2 compliance as standard conditions of equipment acceptance — Chinese GB/T standards alone are not accepted. This is an incremental compliance cost: obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory, and prepare IEC 62933-5-2 system documentation. Engage the lender technical advisor at bid stage. Note that French- and/or Arabic-language O&M documentation may also be required for Mauritania projects.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 毛里塔尼亚捐赠方/贷款方融资BESS项目（世界银行、非开行、欧盟）通常将IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2合规作为设备验收标准条件——仅有中国GB/T标准不被接受。这是增量合规成本：从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书，并准备IEC 62933-5-2系统文件。在投标阶段与贷款方技术顾问接触。注意毛里塔尼亚项目可能还要求法语和/或阿拉伯语运维文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 茅利塔尼亞捐贈方/貸款方融資BESS項目（世界銀行、非開行、歐盟）通常將IEC 62619和IEC 62933-5-2合規作為設備驗收標準條件——僅有中國GB/T標準不被接受。這是增量合規成本：從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書，並準備IEC 62933-5-2系統文件。在投標階段與貸款方技術顧問接觸。注意茅利塔尼亞項目可能還要求法語和/或阿拉伯語運維文件。
